sections.title: 一、完形填空
sections.instruction: 阅读短文，理解其大意，从 A、B、C、D 四个选项中选出可以填入空白处的最佳选项。
sections.passage:
Helen is reading a letter from her friend, Tom. She is very [1] the letter. Tom writes about [2] school. Tom likes his school very much.
Helen likes her school, [3]. Tom's school is very big and he likes his classroom. The [4] and chairs are new, and the windows are very big. They clean the [5] after school to keep it clean. The teachers are nice and his [6] are friendly. He loves [7] because he can learn a lot about the world. He often [8] books in his free time. He also loves sports. He [9] good at playing [10]. He often plays it with his friends after school. He is on the school team. He says he has a good time at school.
Tom doesn't [11] to school on weekends. He gets up early on Saturday. He goes jogging (慢跑) in the park for half a(n) [12]. Then he eats his [13]. At eight he [14] his homework. He has lunch at a fast food restaurant. In the afternoon, he goes shopping with his mum. After dinner, he [15] TV with his family. He enjoys his weekend very much.

questions.translation: 她对这封信感到非常高兴。
questions.explanation: 根据上下文，Tom是Helen的朋友，写信告诉她关于学校的生活，Helen读信时应当是感到高兴的（happy with/about the letter）。

questions.translation: 汤姆写了关于他学校的事情。
questions.explanation: 这里作定语修饰school，且主语是Tom，因此使用形容词性物主代词 his。

questions.translation: 海伦也喜欢她的学校。
questions.explanation: 用于肯定句末表示“也”，用副词 too。

questions.translation: 课桌和椅子是新的
questions.explanation: 根据后文的 and chairs 可知，与椅子常搭配出现的是课桌（desks）。

questions.translation: 他们放学后打扫教室以保持干净。
questions.explanation: 为了保持干净，他们放学后打扫的是教室（classroom）。

questions.translation: 他的同班同学们很友好。
questions.explanation: 在学校里，除了老师（teachers）很赞，他的同学们（classmates）也很友好。

questions.translation: 他喜欢阅读，因为他可以了解很多关于这个世界的知识。
questions.explanation: 根据后句 "He often reads books..." 可知，他喜欢阅读（reading）。

questions.translation: 他经常在空闲时间读书。
questions.explanation: 主语是单数第三人称 He，经常读书用 reads books。

questions.translation: 他擅长踢足球。
questions.explanation: 主语是 He，be good at 结构中 be 动词用 is。

questions.translation: 他擅长踢足球。
questions.explanation: 根据后文 "playing football" 以及 "plays it with his friends" 可知，此处填入 football。

questions.translation: 汤姆周末不去上学。
questions.explanation: 周末不用去上学，go to school 表示“去上学”。

questions.translation: 他在公园里慢跑半小时。
questions.explanation: half an hour 表示“半小时”，是固定表达。

questions.translation: 然后他吃早餐。
questions.explanation: 早上起床慢跑后，吃的是早餐（breakfast）。

questions.translation: 八点钟他做家庭作业。
questions.explanation: 主语是单数第三人称 he，做家庭作业用 does his homework。

questions.translation: 晚饭后，他和家人一起看电视。
questions.explanation: 看电视固定搭配为 watch TV，单数第三人称形式为 watches。

sections.title: 二、阅读理解 第一节 A
sections.instruction: 阅读下面语言材料，从每题所给的 A、B、C、D 四个选项中选出最佳选项。
sections.passage:
Do you want to know the life of a ballet (芭蕾舞) student? Lexi Troianos studies at a ballet art school.
For ballet students, the day starts early. Lexi always gets up at 6:15. Then she puts her dance dress and shoes in her bag and goes out. She needs to do morning exercises before 7 o'clock. She has her first ballet class at 8:00 a.m. She has two classes in the morning. In the first class, the teacher teaches students to do some easy practice (练习). In the second class, students need to do some difficult practice. Lexi always does a good job in class.
At 11:40 a.m., she has lunch. Sometimes she stays in the classroom after class to do more practice for dance shows. She goes home for dinner at 6:00 p.m. And she sleeps before 10:00 p.m. every day.
This is a day of Lexi. It's tiring, but she still works hard.

questions.prompt: The writer starts the passage by _______.
questions.translation: 作者是通过_______开始这篇文章的。
questions.explanation: 文章开头第一句 "Do you want to know the life of a ballet (芭蕾舞) student?" 是一个问句，因此是通过提出问题开始的。

questions.prompt: What does Lexi do in her first ballet class in the morning?
options: A. She does some easy practice.
B. She does some special practice.
C. She does some difficult practice.
D. She does some morning exercises.
questions.translation: 莱克西上午的第一节芭蕾舞课做什么？
questions.explanation: 根据第二段中 "In the first class, the teacher teaches students to do some easy practice (练习)." 可知，她做一些简单的练习。

questions.prompt: Which thing isn't mentioned in the passage?
questions.translation: 文章中没有提到哪样东西？
questions.explanation: 文章中提到了书包（puts her dance dress and shoes in her bag）、时钟/手表（时间词如6:15等）、床（sleeps），但没有提到自行车（bicycle）。

options: D. A day of a ballet student.
questions.translation: 这篇文章主要讲述了什么？
questions.explanation: 根据最后一段 "This is a day of Lexi." 以及文中对她一整天作息的描写，可知文章主要关于一个芭蕾舞学生的一天。

sections.title: 二、阅读理解 第一节 B
sections.instruction: 阅读下面语言材料，从每题所给的 A、B、C、D 四个选项中选出最佳选项。
sections.passage:
Do you know how to relax in your everyday life? If you don't, here is some advice (建议) for you.
**Rest at weekends.** Weekends are the time for a rest. After a week's work, weekends are the best time for you to relax. You can sleep long and get up late. Sleeping well can also help you study better and feel good. You can also watch a movie, or take a walk in the park. But don't watch TV for too long.
**Keep a diary (日记).** You can write down all that you want to say. That's a great way to think about and remember life. You can do it on paper or on computers.
**Have a big dinner.** When you feel unhappy, have a big dinner. Eating delicious food will make you feel good.
**Have a party together.** Having a get-together (聚会) is great fun. Going out with friends will make you happy and relaxed. And it will also bring you a good sleep.

questions.prompt: You can _______ to relax at the weekend.
options: A. watch TV for too long
B. do exercise for one hour
C. read books all the time
questions.translation: 你可以在周末_______来放松自己。
questions.explanation: 根据第二段 "You can sleep long and get up late." 可知，晚起睡懒觉是一种放松方式。

questions.prompt: Which of the following sentences can be put in the blank "[ * ]" (the title of the last paragraph)?
options: C. Be happy all the time.
D. Have fun on your phone.
questions.translation: 以下哪句话可以放进最后一自然段的小标题 "[ * ]" 中？
questions.explanation: 最后一自然段主要阐述了 "Having a get-together (聚会) is great fun. Going out with friends..."，因此小标题应为 "Have a party together."。

questions.prompt: Which of the following suggestions is not mentioned in the passage?
questions.translation: 文章中没有提到以下哪项建议？
questions.explanation: 文中提到了记日记（Keep a diary）、好好睡觉（Rest at weekends部分提到了sleep long）、吃大餐（Have a big dinner），但未提及加入课后俱乐部。

questions.prompt: What's the structure of the passage?
options: A. ① → ②, ③, ④, ⑤
B. ①, ②, ③, ④ → ⑤
C. ① → ② → ③ → ④ → ⑤
D. ①, ②, ③, ④, ⑤
questions.translation: 文章的结构是怎样的？
questions.explanation: 第一段是总起段（引入话题），第二至五段是分述段（分别列出四点放松的建议），因此是“总-分”结构，即 ① → ②, ③, ④, ⑤。

questions.prompt: What's the best title for the passage?
options: B. How to Have a Good Weekend
C. How to Keep a Diary
D. How to Make More Friends
questions.translation: 文章最好的标题是什么？
questions.explanation: 根据开头句 "Do you know how to relax in your everyday life?" 以及全文给出的放松建议可知，最佳标题是 "How to Relax"。

sections.title: 三、任务型阅读
sections.instruction: 阅读下面短文, 根据短文内容, 从短文后所给的六个选项中选出可以填入空白处的最佳选项，使短文意思完整、连贯，有两个多余选项。
sections.passage:
My school day
Hi, I am Alex Green. I am thirteen and I go to Park School in Oxford, England. I go to school on weekdays, but not on Saturdays or Sundays. This is my school day.
[1] My school is next to my house. [2] I go to school at half past eight and see my friends.
My school begins at nine o'clock. We have three lessons in the morning. My favourite subject is art. At eleven o'clock, we have a break in the playground and I talk to my friends. They go to the playground and play football, but I don't like football.
We have lunch in the dining hall at half past twelve. I like school lunch! [3] We usually have meat and rice with vegetables. I drink juice or water.
We start lessons in the afternoon at half past one. We have two lessons in the afternoon. Then we go home at half past three.
In the evening, I watch TV and have dinner with my family. Then I often take a bath and go to bed at ten o'clock. [4]
wordbank: I think it is very tasty and healthy.
I usually play volleyball or table tennis with my classmates after school.
After that, I usually do my homework or read some books.
I get up at half past seven in the morning, and then have some milk and bread for breakfast.
I always go there on foot.
I really like my school life.

questions.answer: I get up at half past seven in the morning, and then have some milk and bread for breakfast.
questions.translation: 空格 [1] 选填项
questions.explanation: 此处作为描述一天的开始，起床并吃早餐最符合逻辑顺序。

questions.answer: I always go there on foot.
questions.translation: 空格 [2] 选填项
questions.explanation: 前句提到 "My school is next to my house."（学校就在我家旁边），因此“我总是步行去那里”符合语境。

questions.answer: I think it is very tasty and healthy.
questions.translation: 空格 [3] 选填项
questions.explanation: 前句提到 "I like school lunch!"（我喜欢学校的午餐！），此空说明原因：觉得它非常美味和健康。

questions.answer: I really like my school life.
questions.translation: 空格 [4] 选填项
questions.explanation: 作为文章的结尾，表达对自己学校生活的热爱（I really like my school life）最为合适。
